input.command:
for d in pg-reactor-esp32-wifi-bt pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt wifi-and-bt-core-on-esp32; do
  echo "########## $d ##########"
  if [ -d "git/$d/.git" ]; then
    git -C "git/$d" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD
    echo "--- status (short) ---"
    git -C "git/$d" status -sb | head -40
    echo "--- unpushed commits (vs upstream) ---"
    git -C "git/$d" log --oneline @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -40 || ec
input.description: Git state of candidate esp32 repos

done
